schema.description: Provides access to Valorant game data including agent metadata, player statistics, match history, leaderboards, and map information for competitive analysis.

tools.name: valorant_list_agent_compositions_for_map
tools.description: Retrieve recommended agent team compositions for a specific Valorant map, including win rates and play rates.

map_name.description: The name of the Valorant map to retrieve agent compositions for (e.g., 'Ascent', 'Bind', 'Haven').

compositions.description: List of agent team compositions with performance metrics for the specified map.

agents.description: List of agent names that form this team composition.

win_rate.description: The win rate percentage of this composition on the specified map.

play_rate.description: The frequency percentage at which this composition is played on the specified map.

description.description: A textual summary explaining the strengths and strategy of this composition.

tools.name: valorant_list_agent_statistics
tools.description: Retrieve performance statistics and meta data for Valorant agents, optionally filtered by agent or map.

agent_name.description: The name of a specific Valorant agent to filter statistics for (e.g., 'Jett', 'Sage', 'Omen').

map_name.description: The name of the Valorant map to filter agent statistics for (e.g., 'Ascent', 'Bind', 'Haven').

statistics.description: List of agent performance statistics based on the applied filters.

agent_name.description: The name of the Valorant agent.

pick_rate.description: The percentage rate at which this agent is selected in matches.

win_rate.description: The win rate percentage achieved when playing this agent.

avg_score.description: The average combat score achieved by players using this agent.

tools.name: valorant_list_agents
tools.description: Retrieve metadata for Valorant agents including their roles, abilities, and descriptions.

limit.description: The maximum number of agent records to return.

agents.description: List of Valorant agents with their metadata and ability information.

name.description: The name of the Valorant agent.

role.description: The gameplay role of the agent (e.g., 'Duelist', 'Controller', 'Initiator', 'Sentinel').

abilities.description: List of the agent's abilities with their details and effects.

description.description: A textual summary describing the agent's background and playstyle.

tools.name: valorant_list_leaderboard
tools.description: Retrieve the competitive leaderboard rankings for a specific Valorant region.

region.description: The region code to retrieve leaderboard data for. Valid values: 'ap' (Asia Pacific), 'br' (Brazil), 'eu' (Europe), 'kr' (Korea), 'latam' (Latin America), 'na' (North America).

limit.description: The maximum number of leaderboard entries to return.

leaderboard.description: List of ranked player entries for the specified region.

rank.description: The player's position on the regional leaderboard.

player_name.description: The display name of the ranked player.

wins.description: The total number of competitive wins for the player.

tools.name: valorant_list_maps
tools.description: Retrieve metadata for Valorant maps including descriptions, locations, and site information.

limit.description: The maximum number of map records to return.

maps.description: List of Valorant maps with their metadata.

name.description: The name of the Valorant map.

description.description: A textual summary describing the map's layout and strategic characteristics.

location.description: The in-game lore location where the map is set.

site_count.description: The number of bomb sites on the map.

tools.name: valorant_list_player_matches
tools.description: Retrieve the match history for a specific Valorant player.

player_name.description: The display name of the player to retrieve match history for.

region.description: The region code to filter matches by. Valid values: 'ap' (Asia Pacific), 'br' (Brazil), 'eu' (Europe), 'kr' (Korea), 'latam' (Latin America), 'na' (North America).

limit.description: The maximum number of match records to return.

matches.description: List of matches from the player's match history.

match_id.description: The unique identifier of the match.

map.description: The name of the Valorant map the match was played on.

agent.description: The name of the Valorant agent the player used in the match.

result.description: The outcome of the match for the player (e.g., 'Victory', 'Defeat', 'Draw').

score.description: The final round score of the match (e.g., '13-7').

created_at.description: The timestamp when the match was played, in ISO 8601 format.

scenarios.description: Basic Valorant data with minimal agents, maps, and player matches to test core functionality

Jett.name: Jett
Jett.description: A fast-paced duelist who excels at aggressive plays and quick escapes

abilities.name: Cloudburst
abilities.description: Throw a projectile that expands into a brief vision cloud on impact

abilities.name: Updraft
abilities.description: Propel yourself upward after a brief delay

Sage.name: Sage
Sage.description: A support agent focused on healing and area denial

abilities.name: Barrier Orb
abilities.description: Equip a barrier orb and fire to place a wall

Ascent.name: Ascent
Ascent.description: An open map with two bomb sites and a large central area
Standard composition with good site control and entry potential
